# SquareChevronUp

## Tags
caret, keyboard, button, mac, control, ctrl, superscript, exponential, power, ahead, menu, panel, ^

## Categories
arrows, navigation, math

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/square-chevron-up)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::SquareChevronUp;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        SquareChevronUp { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
